title: Runtime event contract doctrine
mission: Install a canonical runtime event contract that requires typed envelopes, registered event composition, correlation and causation, successor-event rules, evidence sinks, and proof boundaries for every claimed event listener or cascade.
safeParallelWork: Provider and model routing outside runtime-event doctrine paths
Child-repository product work that does not edit canonical harness contracts
Review of PR #35 without branch mutation
ownedScope: canonical runtime event doctrine and machine-readable policy
typed runtime event envelope and topology schemas
harness, agent, capability, trigger, artifact, app-graph, and codebase-map wiring
public plan and pull-request proof metadata
forbiddenScope: target, account, save, customer-data, or deployment mutation
secrets, private evidence, or raw sensitive payloads
merge, release, force-push, destructive cleanup, or default-branch mutation

tasks.title: Define typed runtime event doctrine
acceptanceCriteria: Root and successor correlation and causation invariants are explicit
Static and synthetic proof cannot claim runtime delivery
evidence: Tracked doctrine, policy, and closed schemas on feat/runtime-event-contract-doctrine

tasks.title: Install runtime event enforcement
acceptanceCriteria: Architecture-only event-listener action claims are rejected
Valid root and successor fixtures pass
Broken correlation or causation fixtures fail
Every required runtime contract node is connected to the app observer
Child templates may strengthen but not weaken the doctrine
evidence: Tracked PowerShell validator, Python contract, synthetic fixtures, app-graph nodes and edges, and template policy

tasks.title: Validate the exact delivery head
outputs: Exact-head Windows and Linux CI evidence
acceptanceCriteria: Harness doctrine and instruction validators pass
Aggregate app harness passes without runtime execution
Branch and PR remain reviewable without force-push

validation: pwsh -NoLogo -NoProfile -File ./scripts/Test-AppHarness.ps1 with an output directory outside the checkout
git diff --check for the full pull-request range
final branch, commit, changed-file, and pull-request review

proof.target: canonical runtime event doctrine, typed envelope and topology contracts, synthetic root-to-successor causality, enforcement wiring, and exact-head cross-platform validation
proof.achieved: Tracked doctrine, policy, schemas, topology, fixtures, validators, workflow, authority wiring, and child template are present; exact-head CI is pending.
proof.ceiling: Does not prove AgentSwitchboard currently emits, observes, handles, cascades, or records runtime events during application execution. It provides no launcher, provider, network, target, account, save, deployment, merge, or live-target proof.

notes: Open a stacked pull request against feat/one-command-harness-proof.
Bind this plan to the actual pull request after creation.
Record exact-head evidence before completing PROOF-01.
A later runtime lane must add actual product nodes and correlated observed artifacts before claiming event delivery.
